
---
title: "Motion"
format: html
---

all short films directed, filmed, and produced by me!

click to view each video
 
more on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@TianaHo-u1d).

---

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/vyS0vN8wLu4" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/YRsCzGxbIOM" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/t5IMdANwaHQ" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/RcCuHg2FvkI" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/PFSWMKho_ZA" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/KP0YZvJY_vs" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>
